sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ القِصَصُ القَصِيرَةُ وَسِيلَةً مُمْتِعَةً لِتَعَلُّمِ الحِكْمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kratke priče se smatraju zabavnim načinom za učenje mudrosti.
sentences.translationEn: Short stories are considered an enjoyable way to learn wisdom.

sentences.arabic: فِي كِتَابِ "كَلِيلَة وَدِمْنَة"، نَجِدُ حِكَايَاتٍ كَثِيرَةً عَلَى لِسَانِ الحَيَوَانَاتِ.
sentences.translation: U knjizi 'Kalila i Dimna' nalazimo mnoge priče ispričane kroz likove životinja.
sentences.translationEn: In the book 'Kalila and Dimna,' we find many tales told through animal characters.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ القَارِئُ مِنْ هَذِهِ القِصَصِ كَيْفِيَّةَ التَّعَامُلِ مَعَ الآخَرِينَ بِذَكَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Čitalac iz ovih priča uči kako da se inteligentno ophodi prema drugima.
sentences.translationEn: The reader learns from these stories how to deal with others intelligently.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الأَطْفَالُ يَسْمَعُونَ هَذِهِ الحِكَايَاتِ قَبْلَ النَّوْمِ مِنْ أَجْدَادِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su ove priče slušala prije spavanja od svojih djedova i nena.
sentences.translationEn: Children used to hear these tales before bed from their grandparents.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ القِصَصُ لَيْسَتْ لِلتَّسْلِيَةِ فَقَطْ، بَلْ لِلتَّرْبِيَةِ أَيْضًا.
sentences.translation: Ove priče nisu samo za zabavu, već i za odgoj.
sentences.translationEn: These stories are not just for entertainment, but also for education.
